creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
makc        2011-04-05 20:06:18 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Added files:
    devel/svn2git        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    devel/svn2git/files  patch-src__src.pro 
  Log:
  Add new port devel/svn2git:
  
  The svn to git converter as used by KDE.  For practical examples on writing
  rules for conversion, see: http://gitorious.org/svn2git/kde-ruleset
  
  WWW: http://gitorious.org/svn2git/
  
  PR:             ports/156097
  Submitted by:   David Naylor <naylor.b.david at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1       +38 -0     ports/devel/svn2git/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/devel/svn2git/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +29 -0     ports/devel/svn2git/files/patch-src__src.pro (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/devel/svn2git/pkg-descr (new)
